greeting.onboardingNamed: Welcome, {name}. Let's set up your workspace.
greeting.activeNamed: Welcome back, {name}. Here's what needs your attention.

onboarding.title: Set up your workspace
onboarding.description: Slothing works best once it has your resume, a target role, and a place to draft tailored documents.

upload-resume.title: Upload your resume
upload-resume.description: We'll organize your experience and make it reusable.

install-extension.title: Install the browser extension
install-extension.description: Capture roles from job boards while you browse.

add-opportunity.title: Add your first opportunity
add-opportunity.description: Track a role and see what documents you need.

create-tailored-doc.title: Create a tailored document
create-tailored-doc.description: Use your resume and target role to draft a stronger application.

upload-resume.intro: Once your resume is in the bank, Slothing has source material for the rest of the workflow.

0.title: Reusable document bank
0.description: Keep your source material organized for every role.

1.title: Better opportunity matching
1.description: Compare jobs against real experience and skills.

2.title: Tailored Studio drafts
2.description: Start from existing material instead of a blank page.

add-opportunity.intro: Once your first role is tracked, Slothing can connect documents and next steps to a real target.

0.title: Focused application plans
0.description: See the documents and prep work each role needs.

1.title: Follow-up timing
1.description: Keep interviews, deadlines, and reminders visible.

2.title: Pipeline clarity
2.description: Watch saved, applied, and interviewing roles move.

install-extension.intro: Once the extension is installed, you can capture roles from job boards directly into Slothing without manual entry.

0.title: One-click role capture
0.description: Save job listings from LinkedIn, Indeed, and more without leaving the page.

1.title: Automatic pre-fill
1.description: Role details are scraped so you skip copying job descriptions by hand.

2.title: Triage queue
2.description: New roles land in the review queue for a quick accept or dismiss.

create-tailored-doc.intro: Once a tailored document exists, your workspace starts turning source material into reusable application momentum.

0.title: Application-ready drafts
0.description: Turn your resume and target role into stronger docs.

1.title: Reusable follow-ups
1.description: Keep recruiter notes aligned with the role context.

2.title: Readiness signals
2.description: Know what is polished and what still needs work.

today.title: Today
today.description: Three focused actions, then you are done.
today.uploadResumeContext: Create the source material for tailored applications.
today.reviewNewTitle: Review {count, plural, one {# new opportunity} other {# new opportunities}}
today.reviewNewContext: Decide what belongs in your pipeline.
today.prepareInterviewsContext: Turn active opportunities into practice prompts.
today.draftFollowUpContext: Keep recruiters warm with a reusable email.
today.tailoredDocumentContext: {count, plural, one {# document} other {# documents}} ready to reuse.

readiness.description: Your application materials at a glance.
readiness.documentsDetail: {count, plural, one {# file} other {# files}} in your bank
readiness.tailoredDetail: {count, plural, one {# resume} other {# resumes}} built

pipeline.title: Pipeline
pipeline.empty: Add opportunities to see your pipeline.

recent.description: The latest items saved to your workspace.

upload.description: Drag and drop your resume to get started, or skip this step and add it later.

review.title: Review Your Profile
review.description: After uploading, review the extracted entries and edit anything that needs fixing.

builder.title: Build Your Starter Profile
builder.description: Answer a few quick prompts so Slothing can organize your career details without a resume upload.

fields.name: Name

actions.import: Import {count, plural, one {# Opportunity} other {# Opportunities}}

textMode.jobUrlHelp: The URL will be saved with the job for reference
textMode.jobContentPlaceholder:
Paste the full job posting here...

Example:
Senior Software Engineer
Acme Corp - San Francisco, CA (Remote)

About the role:
We're looking for an experienced software engineer...

Requirements:
- 5+ years of experience
- Python, TypeScript
...
textMode.jobContentHelp: Paste the entire job description. We'll extract the title, company, requirements, and keywords.

urlMode.jobUrlHelp: We'll fetch the job posting and extract the details automatically.
urlMode.fetchingNote: Note: Some sites may block automated fetching. If the import fails, try pasting the job content directly.

replace.description: Looks like you uploaded "{filename}" on {date}. Replace it, or cancel?

addEntry.description: Manually add an entry to your profile bank.

deleteOne.title: Delete source document?
deleteOne.description: This will permanently delete {filename} and all {count, plural, one {# associated bullet} other {# associated bullets}}. This action cannot be undone.

deleteMany.title: Delete selected source files?
deleteMany.description: This will permanently delete {count, plural, one {# source file} other {# source files}} and all associated bullets. This action cannot be undone.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Keep the source profile Slothing uses for resumes, cover letters, and fit checks.

unsavedChanges.prompt: You have unsaved profile changes. Leave without saving?

answerBankPrompt.text: Want richer profile details? Save reusable stories and facts in your answer bank.

emptyState.title: Let's set up your profile
emptyState.description: Start from a resume so Slothing can fill in the basics, or open the form and add details manually.
emptyState.uploadResume: Upload your resume to fill this in

identity.title: Identity
identity.description: The headline and photo that introduce you across generated materials.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Links and contact details you are comfortable reusing.

summary.title: Professional summary
summary.description: A concise career summary Slothing can adapt for different roles.

savedSignals.title: Saved profile signals
savedSignals.description: Structured details imported from resumes, opportunities, and onboarding.

careerDetails.title: Career details
careerDetails.description: Experience and project highlights currently powering your generated documents.

workStyle.title: Work style
workStyle.description: Choose the roles and environments you want Slothing to prioritize.

targetRoles.title: Target roles
targetRoles.description: List titles or tracks you want generated materials to emphasize.

salary.title: Compensation target
salary.description: Optional salary range used for fit checks and opportunity comparisons.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.description: Control how your profile is reused across recruiter-facing workflows.

openToRecruiters.title: Open to recruiter outreach
openToRecruiters.description: Allow generated materials to mention that you are open to recruiter conversations.

shareContactInfo.title: Share contact info by default
shareContactInfo.description: Include email, phone, and links in exported recruiter-facing documents.
